original_description: Create, revise, and evaluate Codex skills. Use when the user wants to build a new skill, update an existing skill, define trigger conditions, add eval prompts or assertions, benchmark a skill against a baseline, optimize the SKILL.md description for better Codex triggering, or package/share a Codex-ready skill or plugin.
best_description: Create, revise, and evaluate Codex skills. Use when the user wants to build a new skill, update an existing skill, define trigger conditions, add eval prompts or assertions, benchmark a skill against a baseline, optimize the SKILL.md description for better Codex triggering, or package/share a Codex-ready skill or plugin.
final_description: Use this skill when the task is about a Codex skill itself: planning a new skill, revising an existing one, or deciding how it should trigger. It covers drafting or improving `SKILL.md`, sharpening the name/description trigger surface, organizing bundled scripts or references, creating realistic test prompts and assertions, and designing or running skill evaluations such as with-skill vs baseline comparisons, benchmarks, review flows, and iteration plans. Also use it when the user wants to package or share a skill and needs to choose between delivering the skill folder directly, creating a zip archive, or wrapping it in a plugin. Do not use it for ordinary coding work, plugin scaffolding alone, or prompt-writing tasks that are not specifically about a Codex skill.

history.description: Create, revise, and evaluate Codex skills. Use when the user wants to build a new skill, update an existing skill, define trigger conditions, add eval prompts or assertions, benchmark a skill against a baseline, optimize the SKILL.md description for better Codex triggering, or package/share a Codex-ready skill or plugin.

train_results.query: 这个 skill 已经能用了，但我想系统地比较 with-skill 和 baseline 的效果，顺便把 benchmark 和 review 页面也跑起来。你帮我安排整个评测流程。
我准备把做好的 Codex skill 分享给同事，他不是很懂本地安装。你帮我判断应该直接给 skill folder、打 zip，还是包成 plugin。
看一下这个 React 组件为什么会重复渲染，顺手给我改掉。
我刚把一个重复流程整理成 Codex skill，目录先放在 ~/.agents/skills/docx-redliner。你帮我把 SKILL.md、测试 prompts 和第一轮 eval 方案一起设计出来。
帮我写一个 Python 脚本，把这个 CSV 按 create_time 降序排序后输出到 /tmp/sorted.csv。
我在想品牌名，做一个写作风格偏克制、适合 B2B SaaS 的中文 naming brainstorm。

test_results.query: 告诉我今天上海天气怎么样，顺便建议我穿什么。
我想优化一个 Codex skill 的 description，让它更容易在合适的时候被触发。请帮我设计 should-trigger / should-not-trigger 查询，并告诉我怎么跑优化循环。
